Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Discovery Requests To Deft Pacific Gas And Electric Company
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Richard A. Hoyer, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: DAVID SIUDZINSKI
Valerie Sharpe, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: P.G & E Company

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF DAVID SIUDZINSKI's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's First Set On Discovery Requests is granted as it seeks a further response to Form Interrogatory 209.2. The response shall be limited to whistle-blower retaliation. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
